items.title: Equality, truthiness and coercion: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this JavaScript: Language and Browser Applications misconception? The plus operator always performs numeric addition when one operand is a number.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. String participation can make + concatenate; convert inputs explicitly before arithmetic.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. String participation can make + concatenate; convert inputs explicitly before arithmetic.
